title: Monpti
writer: Gábor Vaszary, Willibald Eser, Helmut Käutner
actors: Romy Schneider, Horst Buchholz, Mara Lane
plot: A poor 22 y.o. Hungarian man who's recently arrived in Paris meets a seemingly wealthy 17 y.o. Parisian girl. They fall in love, but tragedy ensues when the truth behind the girl is revealed.
